textByHash.02a5dcafbe0e4832e67b62399443f7e62a61fdca: G.L.O Caranock? I'm not sure where he is I'm afraid.
textByHash.074cd804d809d0e7cda4bd939b28cfa8aa1ba561: If you do find Longramble, I'd appreciate it if you could deliver his order to him. He's requested some tasty tangled toad's legs.
textByHash.07b4857a83f528ac37209eff8601f680d68d5ac7: Captain Daerkin is a gnome pilot, though currently off duty. You should find him somewhere in Al Kharid, he likes to watch a good fight.
textByHash.0997883dbb8a40fa6fc0bf1668194eaeca132573: Fine, your loss. I may have an easier job for you, since you chickened out of that one, If you want another hard one come back in five minutes and maybe I'll be able to find you a something.
textByHash.0bb01edcc4f8f05845b3dbc866898755cfd4b27f: Rometti is the gnome Master Tailor. His shop of beautiful pastel robes can be found in the North East Corner of the Grand Tree.
textByHash.0d43651f37aec103be85f7f70a4a294744734e05: Femi delivers goods to the Stronghold, she can usually be found just outside the Stronghold gates.
textByHash.118158e9cf587132aa70534308282ae51c52083d: Are you sure you want to turn this order down, you'll have to wait 5 minutes before I can give you another easy order. I may have a hard one available for you though...
textByHash.13069dfdf4c07cd95a2164a8f61afefdd79077b2: Once I get recommendations from both of them, you'll be able to start work for me.
textByHash.130817e4d07b90c32f9f4d49d0c22d80f170951d: Once you are working for us, I will give you a choice of either an easy or hard job. I will then ask you to make a piece of Gnome Cuisine, and tell you who ordered it, with some information about how to find him
textByHash.1340cfe1f556cc788169c69ab7ca6e305fc4ba75: Professor Onglewip is visiting the Wizards in the Wizards Tower.
textByHash.1799172613f95749282c2c37fbb62acbcde942c4: Captain Dalbur is stationed in Al Kharid.
textByHash.1a6555b9a02e0ef9f67f9aa487972949576bde5c: Since you've just refused a hard job, I only have a easy job available for you at the moment. If you want to wait for another hard one - come back in a minute.
textByHash.1e1aebbab75917a9ab4cac9045b9a9ce0622f7cb: Two degrees, seven minutes south. Three degrees, seven minutes west.
textByHash.2088c4b64be4c95646c3d3ddc857d6ec61c804a2: Wurbel likes to watch the Gnomeball. He always tries to get a good view.
textByHash.218406b785a3930cf694b40e658063dd83b2cbfd: Garkor. How interesting. I thought he was missing after a gnome glider incident. I'm sure I heard some monkeys in the background when he called.
textByHash.232f1304aa4cd457c1b28537cc6e703d152e6a69: or her. Don't take too long, the order is only valid for a short period of time.
textByHash.243bea430f8befda7b332880256e52efe0659132: Well done. You have worked hard for Aluft Aloft Delivery, and as a reward you are now eligible for a food delivery token that you can use to get food delivered to you!
textByHash.2a2ccadc8c2af0e7c6517a6aaa7c71c94c783884: If you have enough credits to get more than 10 you can still play the game, but you will not get any more delivery credits - you may pick up a nice tip though.
textByHash.2ddb710f3dca35e2fc36bec3b080874f68d23ae5: First of all you will need some basic Gnome Cooking and Cocktail making training. Go and talk to my Father, Aluft Gianne snr. and Blurberry, if you haven't already, and they'll tell you what you need to do.
textByHash.2e3fe11a1db98cbbe0594056f15e63e41f5ffb58: I'm afraid you don't have the required training for this job. If you want to work for me you'll have to talk to my father Aluft Gianne snr. for cooking training and Blurberry the barman for cocktail making training.
textByHash.30faef56a7209d2fa528a7a0cd8acfd4a805f098: Brave Brambickle is off exploring the Northern peaks of Trollweiss Mountain.
textByHash.31e295d95227a66bb0d6f8b897798b78cb6ac077: Of course! My maps are all on dried doogle leaves.
textByHash.364c5fc4483a3d836e9ec251b3787a0998f649fd: Once you have got recommendations from both of them I'd be happy to take you on at Aluft Aloft!
textByHash.3c93fe87d1241bd969fc67e0e52d2d87c127b18e: Hmm, that's sensitive information you know. Who is this gnome?
textByHash.3cb95dc2c16f53872aea17cae915a3bca06d760f: Damwin likes to have a drink with the Gnomeball fans after the match.
textByHash.3fe54bbc479be2521e06b3013fa6c4083800f997: Garkor's the Grand Tree Guardian now. He'll be in the official guardian's residence, near the Grand Tree.
textByHash.4020b88a41c9796644d73978de53a399e239d2d2: Professor Imblewyn is studying human magic in the Mages Guild in Yanille.
textByHash.4438fb4cf973f1c78cc0a8bd435f7b60a6e61c9a: Clearly you are a very hard worker - I think you need a holiday. You have collected all the tokens I can give you. Of course, if you use the tokens up, you can come back and do some more deliveries. I can still give
textByHash.476b02370fac06dc6aa7d34b1be8c6416595b037: I believe Hazelmere has a hut on an Island East of Yanille.
textByHash.4a707eca6862bab471260adc3ee160ee1dec2c25: If you activate your token, a delivery rider will arrive and try to deliver some food to you. This uses up your token. If you want another delivery, you will have to earn more credits from Aluft jnr.
textByHash.4b7ff1d9bd8da8cb68e950e37a77799e8e863157: I'm afraid you don't have the required cooking experience for this job. If you want to work for me you'll have to train up to level 29 cooking, talk to my father Aluft Gianne snr. for cooking training and
textByHash.4f19548334c80bc4faa9c6acc17354ae239a950d: Sarble keeps an eye on the toads and the worms near the pond.
textByHash.52158a9f4c87bfcaefc4b0f81bb3f1857d822c2d: of transport. Gnome gliders are especially useful here.
textByHash.590f200b3665a0b0d0fa8f54bdb0ee84041b13ee: Eebel lives in a hut in the southern end of the stronghold, near to Brimstail's cave.
textByHash.59ea12e6846ac272ad516396f680a7718a5fc2b4: Ermin is one of the flax spinners in the South East of the Stronghold.
textByHash.5c6b0257a9f18f4e11ef49fd2d29bfb9cc774f71: The King has a throne in the base of the Grand tree.
textByHash.6101b263f7890d1d53cc8852a80252ad678888da: For the hard jobs you will be given more time to complete the delivery though. You get three credits for completing it, and the tips you get tend to be useful objects, and even a few unusual items, that you won't
textByHash.61365106c90c58c8fdcb66eb53ef35c2d08baeea: You'd better get a move on then. The clock is already running!
textByHash.62f83363735a7c937bbd90d60c9d5347ea664f49: will not get any more credits - just the normal tip and cooking training.
textByHash.6de53240db22db8fccb220ec24b435aa49c5b2cc: King Bolren rules the Gnome Tree Village, inside the maze.
textByHash.6f26c115aa7c611d2c9aee88e7688104afc89e2d: Ambassador Gimblewap is conducting negotiations in Ardougne Castle.
textByHash.6f44920e2c1758a3e85252a2e801ef9b0d1c9bb2: Nacklepen is the giant tortoise trainer, he hangs around the tortoise training pen north west of the Grand Tree.
textByHash.6fd9b36d94e9e5c7d32ade039ce90a6da60c3df4: Captain Bleemadge has the misfortune to be stationed on the top of White Wolf Mountain.
textByHash.700dd24658e2f60d7f2960b4da4c0eb1f93a6922: Captain Klemfoodle is stationed on the eastern coast of Karamja.
textByHash.715bdef917430445dae0dd9db499236b206f197e: Captain Errdo is the gnome pilot stationed upstairs.
textByHash.728f926bab061af369aed469656165e500120754: Gnormadium is all the way south in the Feldips.
textByHash.7b0a352bdb4f788ea69caf1800db06589f1bd054: Heckel Funch runs the cocktail ingredient shop on the other side of the Grand Tree,
textByHash.7c7c77b2ab61ff820a7c0248b9fad140156f82ae: Guard Vemmeldo is in charge of bank security at the bank in the main part of the Stronghold.
textByHash.7d46b8507a8ba554ea72c6c86b4a460e21bfc2b4: Since you've just refused an easy job, I only have a hard job available for you at the moment. If you want to wait for another easy one - come back in X minutes.
textByHash.7d8b1a00d72c5c150091c23b99700aad5e0c1d75: Blurberry the barman for cocktail making training. Once I get recommendations from both of them, you'll be able to start work for me.
textByHash.7f6181516a567491586b9722e9fd72a35c9f17a1: Since you've just refused an easy job, I only have a hard job available for you at the moment. If you want to wait for another easy one - come back in a minute.
textByHash.84a8f62db5d7b0b102e9be3787c0e9af24e5ca0e: You may only have one token at a time. When you first earn a delivery token (having gained 12 delivery credits, you will be able to receive a single random gnome food or cocktail as your order. If you continue
textByHash.8eaff164e0a192d0d8b805c466f0247c69bc572a: be able to get hold of anywhere else!
textByHash.8ff13ed167bc5ff8cf0502e2405ba7ebf7e81769: Ambassador Ferrnook is attempting to get an audience with the King in Varrock.
textByHash.9092e58a7de228f60359f534a38932cde69ac2b5: Ambassador Spanfipple is conducting negotiations in the White Knight Castle in Falador.
textByHash.9765ba9d3a7cc5ba0838c41a8200bb49c72e7846: Since you've just refused an easy job, I only have a hard job available for you at the moment. If you want to wait for another easy one - come back in less than a minute.
textByHash.9b832e4950d08e124f3d531750e8f88dc730169e: The hard jobs could require you to cook any piece of gnome cuisine or cocktail. The customers could be anywhere in Gielinor, If you are going to complete the delivery in time, you'll probably have to use some form
textByHash.9c5b4398147f0300e543652d7ab42164907d6f60: Brimstail has a cave in the Western side of the Stronghold.
textByHash.a9cb99371fcd7a186be69f81a814f806e55ef9d4: Since you've just refused a hard job, I only have a easy job available for you at the moment. If you want to wait for another hard one - come back in less than a minute.
textByHash.ac8e09e5a4ff2a1fad48b400012f239355c9d4c4: Lieutenant Schepbur commands the Battle Tortoises on the Khazard Battlefield.
textByHash.ad81c0e1769808fbfa4a262f98e2ff7ca8552909: These tokens are not transferrable by the way - this is just a bonus for hard workers!
textByHash.b2e229a6f25d3deb51ab05b3bdb04dc9a9826f07: Penwie the explorer is investigating the Island of Karamja.
textByHash.b359e82e81d495d11b45f36c40faee3c54599db9: Oh yes! I have his coordinates, but I can't find them on my Doogle Maps. Two degrees, seven minutes south. Three degrees, seven minutes west.
textByHash.b4b65cc8d674b727f12f172287e801f1eea4ba45: Wingstone the explorer is surveying the Southern half of the Kharidian Desert.
textByHash.b5e68251a15b40da1852cdce0ff8583ec5e9c59e: Are you willing to take this order on? If you turn it down you'll have to wait five minutes for another hard delivery.
textByHash.bc92ce28c384a714ac9f8ebbe1473f60e7537405: Oh, if you do find Longramble, I'd appreciate it if you could deliver his order to him. He's requested some tasty tangled toad's legs.
textByHash.bd344612eb10b9873c8db5b9e3332cf760f0d4c6: Since you've just refused a hard job, I only have a easy job available for you at the moment. If you want to wait for another hard one - come back in X minutes.
textByHash.bdbe1d1184f10ea00b72301b6ee7decb987847cc: Once you call for a delivery your token will be used up, and you'll have to earn another one, if you want another delivery.
textByHash.bf703d050a90b97f8b3dd97cfeaf849b14ab1258: Professor Manglethorp is visiting some engineers in Keldagrim.
textByHash.c0c91c6392a2a848ec0698cc4747d3c18f9e6aa2: You'll find Coach by the Gnomeball pitch, unsurprisingly.
textByHash.c28d3a6901b17150ab8afd70bc7887f3a6600145: Hello, welcome to Aluft Aloft, the gnome food delivery service. We deliver gnome foods to customers all over Gielinor. Do you want a job? We are always looking for new staff.
textByHash.c682427e85e3b96e6d387b86970bf69ecbb59792: at a time, and they are non-transferrable.
textByHash.c6874f41dc6e77124c0516b9dae76f2e6116ed21: Ah, well, that might be different. I have a long-standing order for Longramble. Problem is, no one has been able to reach him.
textByHash.c864d8aa3de21e52381488fc5594d8191cc561cb: to earn credits, you will receive an extra random item per 12 credits.
textByHash.cb9d306df0dbb3db09fe197d9187e22b0e3524cd: Captain Ninto is an off duty gnome pilot usually stationed on White Wolf Mountain, he should be found somewhere nearby - probably the closest place that sells beer.
textByHash.cf93273d6ad8e6a005a8cf1ee45f935fe65f9e91: Dalila is sitting in the gnome restaurant with her long- suffering husband.
textByHash.d7d0acb37787c2e067e6bb5a8474bad5b0a71a15: you a job if you're really keen, but you'll only be able to collect tips.
textByHash.dab1568e0c2b7734b2b5a22ec51d90373867f9bd: Since you've refused both the last hard and easy job I've offered you, you'll have to wait for new orders to come through - come back in X minutes.
textByHash.dd9c8a5f33757c3d22c370eb88cb30a1242effe8: Burkor keeps guard in the tower just south east of the Gnomeball field.
textByHash.df1ac66b36a239f3195763612eb9b0b882ce74b4: Fine, your loss. If you want another easy job one come back in five minutes and maybe I'll be able to find you one.
textByHash.e0c8c5963f3c69037c2736b87db953acab61c7f1: I'll give you a free delivery token when you earn 12 credits. You can then use the token to make a food order yourself! This is a great privilege, we normally only deliver to gnomes. You may only have one token
textByHash.e3243b40429e5cb7f5c1f0db518ec454b20f5497: You will be able to develop your cooking skills during deliveries - you'll get the normal training for making the items, but also a bonus for successfully delivering the goods.
textByHash.e570e04dfc42ab8a20bd8366f824a596a00f4b81: If you gain more credits then for every 12 extra credits you earn, you will receive an extra item of food or drink per delivery, up to a maximum of ten items. You can continue to make deliveries after this, but you
textByHash.e8709f6b77e60e3b2535fd3447f1a733cd3000c4: You'd better get started, you have a long way to go...
textByHash.ea08b982fa6ea350fc949a70af1ce8242785bf95: The foods that you need to cook for the easy jobs are more straight forward than the hard ones, and the customers will be within the Gnome Stronghold, or one of the Gnome Glider Pilots on duty. You will get one
textByHash.ec8a9858acab169e44cdbc3e1397ea6f2845499d: Meegle breeds Terrorbirds, in the big Terrorbird pen to the West of the Village.
textByHash.ee710295f500526bdc1856bc2057bf0f00aa264f: Since you've refused both the last hard and easy job I've offered you, you'll have to wait for new orders to come through - come back in less than a minute.
textByHash.ee7b432618cd6aeef5ea85bfe207744628a0dc4a: Are you sure you want to turn this order down, you'll have to wait 5 minutes for another hard order, although I may be able to give you an easy one.
textByHash.f17d3bf0c25728097b1ed4223387324b44fb8221: Froono likes to look down on the Magic trees in the South of the Stronghold.
textByHash.f35486f2f3eaccb494fbea011404aaa44a8b5930: Gulluck is the local armourer, he's upstairs in the Grand Tree.
textByHash.f470a10d3b361b0ced16a17b6ce11a3288726914: credit for completing a delivery, and the tips you get will be a small amount of cash.
textByHash.f6f72b9091f84187d2b0aa7a3433df55b88e1e8f: Perrdur is sitting in the gnome restaurant with his domineering wife Dalila.
textByHash.f7f92f942c23758dd12da937f53ba0d46ec1ebf5: If you complete the delivery successfully, you will be given a tip by the customer and credit towards your own 'free delivery token'.
textByHash.fcedae6b16c88fcb9e08d9afe3be13052a432bc5: Since you've refused both the last hard and easy job I've offered you, you'll have to wait for new orders to come through - come back in a minute.
